inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 operating cash flow $785.8M less capital spending $177.7M ÷ 76.568M diluted shares per ALGN/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260227_rpt20251231_acc0001097149_26_000014.htm
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 FCF per share anchors owner cash; Clear Aligner ~84% of revenue; scanner ecosystem valued separately as option.

bear.notes: ASP compression and DTC competition; teen-case volume stagnation

base.notes: Clear Aligner retention + international mix; Systems growth mid-single-digit

bull.notes: Teen-case volume recovery + iTero scanner adoption acceleration

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Asset-light medical device; goodwill $492M on balance sheet (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Deferred revenue $1.43B; RPO $1.44B recognized over ~1 year

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.answer: Yes — iTero scanner and digital platform
option_scan.evidence: Systems and Services revenue $789.6M FY2025; separate scanner_platform_option component

growth_explanation.mechanism: Clear Aligner case volume growth from teen and adult orthodontic adoption; international expansion; partially offset by ASP pressure and DTC competition
growth_explanation.bear_falsifier: Consolidated revenue growth falls below 2% for four consecutive quarters
growth_explanation.bull_falsifier: Clear Aligner segment revenue re-accelerates above 8% with stable gross margin

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Four additive components map Clear Aligner owner cash, scanner platform option, net financial claims, and competition/ASP reserve once each.

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ALGN/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260227_rpt20251231_acc0001097149_26_000014.htm: FY2025 revenue $3862.3M, OCF $785.8M, FCF $608.1M, cash $1043.9M, no debt; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

inputs.label: FY2025 net cash provided by operating activities
FY2025 payments to acquire property, plant and equipment
FY2025 Clear Aligner segment net revenues

source.locator: Clear Aligner segment net revenues $3,245.4M (~84% of consolidated)

inputs.label: FY2025 weighted average diluted shares outstanding

assumptions.label: Normalized owner free cash flow per diluted share
assumptions.rationale: FY2025 operating cash flow less capital spending per diluted share; Clear Aligner franchise drives ~84% of consolidated revenue.

assumptions.label: Growth years 1–5
assumptions.rationale: Lawrence bear/base/bull owner-cash growth; teen-case volume recovery.

assumptions.label: Growth years 6–7
assumptions.rationale: Fade as clear-aligner market matures internationally.

assumptions.label: Required return on owner cash
assumptions.rationale: Medical-device compounder bounds; not the stance gate.

assumptions.label: Selling multiple in year 7
assumptions.rationale: Lawrence exit multiples 20× / 24× / 28× on year-7 cash path.

assumptions.label: Component schedule adjustment factor
assumptions.rationale: Preserves component schedule while filing facts anchor FY2025 FCF per share.

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ALGN/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260227_rpt20251231_acc0001097149_26_000014.htm: FY2025 revenue $3862.3M, OCF $785.8M, FCF $608.1M, cash $1043.9M, no debt; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

inputs.label: FY2025 Systems and Services segment net revenues (iTero scanners, CAD/CAM)

source.locator: Systems and Services segment net revenues $789.6M FY2025

inputs.label: FY2025 total deferred revenue (current + noncurrent)
FY2025 diluted shares

assumptions.label: Risk-adjusted iTero scanner and digital-platform ecosystem upside
assumptions.rationale: Non-overlapping claim on scanner/software monetization beyond normalized Clear Aligner engine; Q1 FY2026 Systems revenue +8% YoY supports base band.

driver_model.timing_basis: Scanner lease contracts convert over 2–4 years.

inputs.label: FY2025 research and development expense
FY2025 share-based compensation expense
FY2025 diluted shares

assumptions.label: Competition, ASP pressure, and litigation stress reserve
assumptions.rationale: Negative reserve for DTC competition, average selling price compression, antitrust litigation, and China/international share risk not fully embedded in core owner-cash path.

calculations.label: Competition and ASP reserve per share

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of Align Technology, including Clear Aligner owner cash, scanner platform upside, net financial claims, and competition/ASP reserve.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Consolidated Clear Aligner engine valued through owner-cash discount on FY2025 FCF per share; scanner option, net liquidity, and competition reserve are separate overlap keys.

economic_value_analysis.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K: stockholders' equity $4.05B; economic value in normalized owner cash ($7.942/sh), not GAAP book alone.

component_groups.label: Clear Aligner owner-cash engine
component_groups.economic_claim: Invisalign clear-aligner normalized free cash flow
component_groups.valuation_basis: Owner-cash discount on FY2025 FCF per diluted share.
component_groups.adjustments: Clear Aligner ~84% of consolidated revenue; Systems option separate.

component_groups.label: iTero scanner and digital-platform option
component_groups.economic_claim: Incremental iTero scanner and CAD/CAM monetization
component_groups.valuation_basis: Risk-adjusted milestone value on Systems segment upside.
component_groups.adjustments: Not in Lawrence base FCF path; Q1 FY2026 Systems revenue +8% YoY.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Base ~35% that scanner ecosystem sustains high-single-digit growth; low case zero.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Scanner lease and software contracts convert over 2–4 years per FY2025 10-K.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Leased iTero fleet is customer-funded; incremental capex minimal.

component_groups.label: Net cash claims on common equity
component_groups.economic_claim: Net corporate liquidity after operating minimum
component_groups.valuation_basis: Net asset value on filing-locked cash less debt.
component_groups.adjustments: No long-term debt; $300M revolver undrawn; net cash ~$13.6/sh gross.

component_groups.label: Competition and ASP stress reserve
component_groups.economic_claim: DTC competition, ASP compression, and litigation stress
component_groups.valuation_basis: Bounded negative reserve; not full enterprise value haircut.
component_groups.adjustments: Partial dhando: antitrust and Angelalign litigation could compress margins faster than low growth.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Clear Aligner owner-cash engine
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Net cash claims on common equity

source_lineage.locator: Clear Aligner segment net revenues $3,245.4M (~84% of consolidated)
Systems and Services segment net revenues $789.6M FY2025

falsifiers: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
